name: Peanut Butter Candy Cake
recipeIngredient: 5 0.6 Oz Size Reese's Peanut Butter Cups (chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and oats in a bowl; cool mixture to room temperature.
2. In a large bowl, cream together butter, light brown sugar, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Gradually blend in the oatmeal mix.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
6. Gently fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until combined.
7. Pour batter into a greased and floured 13x9 pan.
8. Chop Reese's Peanut Butter Cups into small pieces and sprinkle on top of the batter without stirring.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40-45 minutes, or until set.
Frosting:
1. Melt butter over low heat in a saucepan.
2. Add unsweetened chocolate to the melted butter; stir constantly until fully melted and combined.
3. Pour mixture into a bowl, then add confectioner's sugar, salt, milk, and vanilla extract.
4. Beat until well blended and chilled before spreading on the cake.
